ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-23-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-03-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3760.

Ashwin V. Ladva, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ladva, Shoker & Associates.
Amended Default entered against defendant on March 24, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ladva, Shoker & Associates, and against the Defaulted Defendant Naveen Singha as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,092.30.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,419.15.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - $379.00, for a total of $25,890.45.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
